mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE 1=1
AND EMP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY emp_seq ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET employeeId = #{employeeId}, password = #{password}, emp_nm = #{empNm}, active = #{active}, phone = #{phone}, birth = #{birth}, deptName = #{deptName}, position = #{position}, role = #{role}, hireDate = #{hireDate}, resignDate = #{resignDate} WHERE emp_seq = #{empSeq}
